task_text:
invoices.csv contains a list of client accounts. Update the "Due Date" column
for any row where "Amount Owed" is 0.00, changing it to "PAID". Save the file.

content.text: Sure! Let me start by reading the file to understand its contents.

content.content:
Name,Email,Amount Owed,Due Date
Jordan Ellis,jordan.ellis@example.com,150.00,2026-06-01
Priya Nair,priya.nair@example.com,75.50,2026-06-05
Marcus Webb,marcus.webb@example.com,220.00,2026-05-28
Sofia Reyes,sofia.reyes@example.com,0.00,2026-06-10
Tyler Brooks,tyler.brooks@example.com,340.25,2026-05-15

content.text: Sofia Reyes is the only row with an `Amount Owed` of `0.00`. I'll update her `Due Date` to `PAID` and save the file now.

input.content:
Name,Email,Amount Owed,Due Date
Jordan Ellis,jordan.ellis@example.com,150.00,2026-06-01
Priya Nair,priya.nair@example.com,75.50,2026-06-05
Marcus Webb,marcus.webb@example.com,220.00,2026-05-28
Sofia Reyes,sofia.reyes@example.com,0.00,PAID
Tyler Brooks,tyler.brooks@example.com,340.25,2026-05-15

content.text:
Done! Here's a summary of the change made:

- **Sofia Reyes** — `Due Date` updated from `2026-06-10` → **`PAID`** (the only row with `Amount Owed` of `0.00`).

All other rows were left untouched.
